about.heroDesc: Founders KSA connects, educates, and amplifies the founders shaping Saudi Arabia's future economy. We provide the resources that didn't exist when we needed them.
about.whyPara1: Finding clear, reliable information about starting a business in Saudi Arabia was unnecessarily difficult. Government portals, scattered blog posts, and word-of-mouth advice left aspiring entrepreneurs confused.
about.whyPara2: Founders KSA was built to change that — a single destination with comprehensive licensing guides, authentic founder stories, and real ecosystem data. No fluff, no gatekeeping.
about.missionDesc: To empower aspiring entrepreneurs with the knowledge, resources, and inspiration they need to build successful businesses in Saudi Arabia.
about.visionDesc: A thriving Saudi entrepreneurial ecosystem where every founder has access to clear guidance and a supportive community.
about.valuesDesc: Transparency, accessibility, and authenticity. We believe real stories and practical guides make the difference.
about.fourPillarsDesc: Everything a founder needs to navigate the Saudi ecosystem — from day one to scale.
about.startupGuideDesc: The most comprehensive free resource for starting a business in KSA — licensing, registration, visas, and funding.
about.founderStoriesDesc: In-depth editorial features on the founders behind Saudi Arabia's most ambitious companies.
about.risingFoundersDesc: A curated spotlight on early-stage founders making moves in the Kingdom.
about.ecosystemInsightsDesc: Data-driven analysis on Saudi Arabia's startup ecosystem and Vision 2030 impact.
about.dataSourcesDesc: Every guide and resource on Founders KSA is built from official government data and verified institutional sources.
about.contactDesc: Have a question, want to share your story, or collaborate? We'd love to hear from you.
about.messageSentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

startupGuide.heroDesc: Everything you need to know about starting and running a business in KSA — licensing, registration, funding, visas, and more. All in one place.
startupGuide.playbookDesc: The brutally honest knowledge base. Real timelines vs. official timelines. Real costs vs. official costs. Common mistakes, rejection reasons, and insider tips that nobody tells you.
startupGuide.comingSoonDesc: We're building out more guides to cover every aspect of starting up in Saudi Arabia.
startupGuide.communityDriven: We're a community-driven guide — here to help you navigate the process. Reach out and we'll point you in the right direction.
startupGuide.misaDesc: The complete guide to obtaining your foreign investment permit — fees, process, documents, and eligibility.
startupGuide.faqDesc: The most common questions foreign entrepreneurs ask about setup, taxes, visas, Saudization, and more — all answered.
startupGuide.premiumDesc: Everything about Saudi Arabia's Iqama Mumayza — 7 pathways, privileges, real estate rights, and how to apply.
startupGuide.companyRegDesc: How to register your company with the Ministry of Commerce — name reservation, Articles of Association, and more.
startupGuide.personalLicenseDesc: Everything about the freelance and personal business license for individuals in Saudi Arabia.
startupGuide.incubatorsDesc: A complete directory of approved incubators, accelerators, and VC programs recognized by MISA.
startupGuide.bankDesc: How to open a corporate bank account, register with ZATCA for taxes, and set up compliance.
startupGuide.visasDesc: Iqama process, work visa sponsorship, and how to bring your team to Saudi Arabia.
startupGuide.legalDesc: Understanding Saudi business law, contracts, IP protection, and regulatory requirements.
startupGuide.fundingDesc: Government grants, VC landscape, and funding options available for startups in KSA.
startupGuide.ecosystemDesc: How the Saudi startup ecosystem works — key players, hubs, Vision 2030 sectors, and opportunities.

playbook.title: The Founder's Playbook
playbook.subtitle: Real timelines vs official timelines
playbook.heroDesc: The brutally honest, stage-by-stage knowledge base for starting a business in Saudi Arabia. Real timelines vs. official timelines. Real costs vs. official costs. Common mistakes that cost founders months and thousands of riyals.
playbook.heroDesc2: Based on real founder experiences, practitioner insights, government sources, and verified consultancy data. This is the guide nobody gives you.
playbook.noResultsDesc: Try a different search term or clear the filters
playbook.playbookBuilt: This playbook is built from real founder experiences. If you've been through the process and have tips, corrections, or horror stories to share — we want to hear from you.

misa.heroDesc: Everything you need to know about the MISA Entrepreneur License — fees, process, documents, and step-by-step walkthrough.
misa.misaDesc: A specialized investment permit by the Ministry of Investment Saudi Arabia (MISA), designed to support startups, entrepreneurs, and innovation-driven businesses entering the Saudi market.
misa.foreignOwnershipDesc: No local partner needed. Full control of your business.
misa.noMinCapitalDesc: Unlike standard licenses — start lean, scale fast.
misa.noParentCompanyDesc: Launch directly in Saudi Arabia without a holding company.
misa.residencyIqamaDesc: Live & work permit for you and your family.
misa.feesDesc: Scale without heavy government costs. Fees are deeply subsidized in your early years.
misa.tier1Desc: Deeply subsidized. Validate your business model with minimal overhead.
misa.tier2Desc: Moderate increase as your business matures — still far below standard.
misa.tier3Desc: Full rate after 5 years of subsidized growth.
misa.sevenSteps: 7 clear steps to becoming a fully operational company in Saudi Arabia.
misa.step1Desc: Join an approved Incubator, Accelerator, or VC recognized by MISA. On completion, you'll receive a mandatory Support Letter.
misa.step2Desc: Passport copies for all shareholders, Support Letter, Business Plan, and NOC if you have an existing Saudi Iqama.
misa.step3Desc: Create an account on the MISA Portal (Invest Saudi). Upload all documents and submit online.
misa.step4Desc: Once approved, pay the first year's fee of SAR 2,000 through the portal.
misa.step5Desc: Your Entrepreneur License is issued — typically within 5–7 business days. This is your Investment Permit.
misa.step6Desc: Apply for a CR through the Ministry of Commerce. Reserve your company name and draft your Articles of Association.
misa.step7Desc: Open a corporate bank account, register with ZATCA, join Chamber of Commerce, register with GOSI, and issue work visas.
misa.importantDesc: The MISA License is your Investment Permit — the right to invest as a foreign entity. The Commercial Registration (CR) is what officially establishes your company. You need both to operate.
misa.backedStartupsDesc: Companies with approved incubator / accelerator backing
misa.technologyDesc: Software, AI, fintech, and deep tech ventures
misa.faq1q: Is the MISA license the same as company registration?
misa.faq1a: No. The MISA license is your Investment Permit — the eligibility criterion to invest as a foreign entity. After receiving it, you must separately obtain a Commercial Registration (CR) from the Ministry of Commerce to officially establish your company.
misa.faq2q: Do I need a local Saudi partner?
misa.faq2a: No. The Entrepreneur MISA License allows 100% foreign ownership. You have full control without any local partner requirement.
misa.faq3a: There is no minimum capital requirement for the Entrepreneur MISA License, unlike standard investment licenses.
misa.faq4q: How long does the process take?
misa.faq4a: The MISA license itself is typically issued within 5–7 business days after approval. The full process (from support letter to operations) varies but can take 4–8 weeks depending on document readiness.
misa.communityDriven: We're a community-driven guide — here to help you navigate the process. Reach out and we'll point you in the right direction.

common.disclaimerText: This directory is compiled from official program websites, Monsha'at's Saudi Incubators & Accelerators Network (SIAN), and verified public directories. Application details, equity terms, funding amounts, and availability may change. Always verify directly with the program before applying. This guide is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an endorsement of any program.
common.knowProgramDesc: We want this directory to be the most complete resource for founders in Saudi Arabia. If you know an incubator or accelerator that should be listed here, let us know.
common.needHelpDesc: We're a community-driven guide — reach out and we'll point you in the right direction or connect you with trusted service providers.
common.readyToApplyDesc: We specialize in Entrepreneur & Investor tracks. Let us guide you through the process.
